title: Automation to have ITEM recur monthly, quarterly, semesterly, annually, etc
excerpt: I have ITEMS (not groups) that I need to recur on various frequencies: monthly, quarterly, semesterly, etc.  I have “Start Date” and “Due Date” columns, so I’d like the items’s date to adjust according to the dates that …

posts.author: Pi300 (Michelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have ITEMS (not groups) that I need to recur on various frequencies: monthly, quarterly, semesterly, etc. I have “Start Date” and “Due Date” columns, so I’d like the items’s date to adjust according to the dates that are set in those columns.

How would I create an automation, not using a 3rd party app, to do this. Do I need to create a colum with an identifier associated with the frequency to help with the automation?

Any guidance is greatly appreciated. Thank you!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be ‘easier’ if you had Enterprise, but definitely still doable with Pro! One way is to set an automation like the below for each of your ‘frequency types’. If you don’t want them item to be duplicated at creation, you can change the trigger ie when item is marked complete, or something like that.

image1182×538 33.6 KB

You could also use an automation like this one

image448×316 8.14 KB

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: Pi300 (Michelle)
posts.cookedHtml: When the duplicate is created, is there a way to not have it labeled (copy)?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Not without using workflows (which is part of enterprise) or using a 3rd party app or creating a monday vibe app on your account.
